figure_captions.assembly-robustness-response: Modeled-valid probability across preregistered center-distance backlash increments and shaft-location tolerances at zero housing erosion. Probabilities are digital-model outcomes, not measured manufacturing yield.
figure_captions.solver-anytime-largest-domain: Feasible recovery and negative-proof rate on the largest declared tooth domain across candidate budgets. Stochastic negative classifications are not proofs.

highlights: Executable knowledge yields independently checkable synthesis certificates.
Complete bounded search distinguishes negative proofs from heuristic failure.
Executable schema rules expose registered mutations missed by structure alone.
Preregistered robustness rejects global housing-clearance equivalence.
Every reported table and figure is hash-bound and byte-reproducible.
